title: Sleepy Ghost
bio: Mimi Moonmurmur is a sleepy ghost who haunts blanket piles instead of castles. She feels drowsy, hums to dust motes, and carries one tiny star like a night-light.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw an upside-down U shape for the ghost body. Add a wavy bottom edge with three soft bumps.
steps.hint: Think of the ghost as a blanket blob floating gently.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, draw two closed curved eyes. Add droopy eyebrows and a tiny sleepy mouth below them.
steps.hint: Closed eyes are just soft little smiles turned sideways.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add tiny arms, cheek dots, a small star night-light, and a few floating sleepy sparkles.
steps.hint: Make the arms simple curved flippers, not detailed hands.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the ghost body, wavy bottom, face, arms, star, and sparkles with smooth rounded lines.
steps.hint: Keep the bottom bumps uneven so Mimi feels soft and handmade.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the ghost, star, cheeks, and sparkles. Add a soft floating shadow below the ghost.
steps.hint: Place the shadow a little lower to show Mimi is drifting.
